title: lobelia zeylanica var. aligera
intro: Lobelia zeylanica var. aligera is a plant species of the Lobelia genus, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). The medicinal properties of Lobelia zeylanica var. aligera have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various other conditions, including rheumatism and skin problems. Lobelia zeylanica var. aligera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
